user.title: Symetrix appliance
user.description: Address of the Symetrix appliance on the network. If it is not reachable yet, check "Skip connection test" — the controls will stay unavailable until the appliance answers.

data.skip_test: Skip connection test (appliance not reachable yet)

musiselect.title: MusiSelect device
musiselect.description: Address of the MusiSelect music source. Leave the host empty if there is none.

channels.title: Add a channel
channels.description: Channels added so far: {count}. Give the channel's controller number, a name, and its calibrated volume at 50% and at 100% — other percentages are computed between these two points. Leave number and name empty and uncheck "Add another" to finish.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the appliance
error.duplicate_channel: This controller number is already configured
error.channel_incomplete: Give both a controller number and a name (or leave both empty to finish)

connection.title: Appliance connections
connection.description: Addresses of the Symetrix appliance and the MusiSelect music source (leave the MusiSelect host empty if there is none). If the Symetrix is not reachable yet, check "Skip connection test" — the controls will stay unavailable until it answers.

data.skip_test: Skip connection test (appliance not reachable yet)

add_channel.title: Add a channel
add_channel.description: The channel plays at "Volume at 50%" for the 50% level and at "Volume at 100%" for the 100% level; other percentages are computed between these two points. 0% is always off.

edit_channel_form.title: Edit a channel
edit_channel_form.description:
The channel plays at "Volume at 50%" for the 50% level and at "Volume at 100%" for the 100% level; other percentages are computed between these two points. 0% is always off.

With the current calibration, {name} plays at: {preview}

levels.title: Volume levels
levels.description: The percentage levels to offer, separated by commas (e.g. 0, 50, 60, 70, 80, 90, 100). Each level becomes a toggle.

add_event.title: Add an event button
add_event.description: Turning the event on loads the Symetrix preset, waits for the delay, then sends the MusiSelect command. After the duration (e.g. the song length), the return preset switches back to the normal source. Blocked while a pause is active.

edit_event_form.title: Edit an event button
edit_event_form.description: Turning the event on loads the Symetrix preset, waits for the delay, then sends the MusiSelect command. After the duration (e.g. the song length), the return preset switches back to the normal source. Blocked while a pause is active.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the appliance
error.duplicate_channel: This controller number is already configured
error.invalid_levels: Invalid levels: whole percentages between 0 and 100, separated by commas
error.event_action_required: Set at least a preset or a MusiSelect command

abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the appliance to run the test

set_level.name: Set volume level
set_level.description: Sets every channel to its calibrated volume for a percentage. Any percentage from 0 to 100 works, not just the configured level toggles. Paused channels are skipped.

level.name: Level
level.description: Percentage of the volume range (0 = off).

trigger_event.name: Trigger an event
trigger_event.description: Starts a configured event by name (e.g. the birthday song): loads the Symetrix preset, waits the delay, sends the MusiSelect command, then after the duration loads the return preset. Blocked while a pause is active.

name.name: Event name
name.description: The name of the event button as configured in the options.

cancel_event.name: Cancel an event
cancel_event.description: Stops a running event early and loads its return preset, if one is configured.

name.name: Event name
name.description: The name of the event button as configured in the options.
